negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing unified pre-simulation detection path with async_cache classification for pool-sourced and augmented scheduled async sources.
related_but_insufficient_code: Both scheduled and regular candidates eventually use build_short_async_commitment_transaction, but the port executes them in separate match arms and has no async_cache classification or common pre-simulation merge gate.

rationale: The unified source path supersedes the separate augmented async loop and represents the effective builder rule for scheduled async candidates.
statement: Pool-sourced scheduled transactions and contract-state-augmented scheduled transactions must be merged before async simulation so both sources receive the same sender de-duplication, active-job suppression, heartbeat-aware wallet and TTL checks, async_cache classification, and commitment-generation logic.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create one pool-sourced scheduled async tx and one contract-state-augmented scheduled async tx that need identical async_cache and wallet/TTL decisions; assert they pass through one shared detection/classification path.
Assert async_cache entries are required for both sources before commitment generation.
summary: Scheduled async sources do not share the specified unified async detection/cache path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search for async_cache/classification in payload builder; current port lacks the shared cache and uses separate candidate arms.
title: Scheduled async sources share one detection path
